questions.text: How to debug and verify software systems in the large scale field environment?
Can we identify performance issues in ultra-large-scale systems?
How to improve logging practice in software development and operation?
What can we learn from past software development and operation history?
How to scale software engineering research to cope with big data?

education.title: Ph.D. in Computer Science
education.body:
Queen's University, Kingston, Canada
Supervised by Dr. Ahmed E. Hassan
Thesis: Log Engineering: Towards Systematic Log Mining to Support the Development of Ultra-large Scale Systems

education.title: M.Sc. in Computer Science
education.body:
Queen's University, Kingston, Canada
Supervised by Dr. Ahmed E. Hassan
Thesis: Enabling Large-Scale Mining Software Repositories Studies Using Web-Scale Platforms

teaching.title: ECE / SOEN 691: Mining Large Software System Data for DevOps
teaching.description: Graduate level course detailing software repository mining, software log telemetry, APM tools integration, and data science for performance engineering. Topics focus on empirical methodologies for cloud-native deployment auditing.

teaching.title: SOEN 341: Software Process
teaching.description: Core undergraduate course introducing modern Agile methodologies, software development lifecycles, test-driven development, continuous integration, and version control collaboration.
